sections.paragraph:
fut. יִגְמֹר.-

(1) to complete, to finish, Psa 57:3, אֵל גֹּמֶר עָלַי “God who will complete for me,” i.e. will plead my cause; Psa 138:8, seq. בְּעַד.

(2) intrans. to leave off, to fail, Psa 7:10 12:2 77:9 . In the Aramean dialects this root is of frequent occurrence in both significations.
